title: scirpus neesii
intro: Scirpus neesii, also known as Sea Club-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Scirpus neesii include treating urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and bladder infections, as well as reducing swelling and pain. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
